metadata.title: Mestermind
metadata.description: Find trusted local professionals in Budapest.

licenceNotes.gas_engineer_certificate_required_for_ga: Gas engineer certificate required for gas appliances

services.title: Find the right pro
services.hint: Choose a service to see matching pros.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join Mestermind to find trusted local pros, save projects, and manage every request from one place.

phone.helper: We use Firebase SMS verification to keep customer accounts trustworthy.
phone.codeHelper: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {phone}. Your phone is linked when you create the account.

passwordHints.title: Your password must:
passwordHints.identity: not contain your name or email
passwordHints.common: not be commonly used, easily guessed or contain any variation of the word "Mestermind"

terms.prefix: By clicking Create Account, you agree to the

panel.title: Your account gives you
panel.savedProjects: Saved project details so you can contact more than one pro.
panel.messages: Private messages and quote updates in your dashboard.
panel.appointments: Appointment tracking and reviews after the job is complete.

errors.verifyPhone: Verify your phone number before creating your account.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to manage requests, messages, appointments, and saved projects.

forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for {email}, a password reset email has been sent.

panel.title: What you can do after logging in
panel.quotes: Track quotes and job status in one place.
panel.account: Manage appointments, reviews, and account details.

common.documentHint: PDF, JPG or PNG · max 10 MB

layout.exitWarning: Your pro account has not been created yet. If you exit now, your signup progress may be lost.
layout.exitText: Your pro account hasn't been created yet. If you exit now, your signup progress may be lost.

account.subtitleExisting: You are already signed in, so we will use this account for your mester profile. Just verify the phone number customers can use to reach you.
account.subtitleNew: Your phone number is how customers reach you and how we send job alerts. We verify it now to keep the platform trustworthy.
account.existingNotice: You'll become a mester with your existing account. No new login or password is needed.
account.phoneFlagOff: Phone verification is currently disabled by feature flag. We will save this phone number unverified.
account.phoneVerified: This phone number is verified on your Firebase account.
account.phoneHelper: We send a Firebase SMS code and link this number to your account before you continue.
account.codeHelper: We verify the code and attach the number to your Firebase account when you continue.

trade.title: Pick your trade
trade.subtitle: Choose the category that best describes your work. You'll pick specific services next — this powers how customers find you.
trade.certificateLater: {note} — you'll upload your certificate in a later step.
trade.insuranceRequired: Proof of liability insurance is also required.

area.title: Where do you work?
area.subtitle: Pick the Budapest districts you cover. Customers can only find you in the districts you select — so choose all that you're happy to travel to.
area.radiusHint: We'll also show you jobs within this radius of your home postcode.

profile.title: Build your profile
profile.subtitle: This is what customers see when they find you. A complete, honest profile gets significantly more enquiries.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Describe your experience, what makes you stand out, and how you work. Customers read this before they contact you.

work.title: Add past projects
work.subtitle: Turn sample work into project cards. Add a before and after photo if it helps, plus the basic details customers care about.
work.jobTypePlaceholder: e.g. Bathroom renovation, Deep cleaning, AC installation
work.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly explain the job, result, or customer need.

faq.title: Answer common questions
faq.subtitle: These answers appear on your public profile and help customers understand how you price, plan, and work.
faq.pricing: What should the customer know about your pricing (e.g., discounts, fees)?
faq.pricingPlaceholder: Mention call-out fees, discounts, material costs, minimum job size, or when the final price may change.
faq.process: What is your typical process for working with a new customer?
faq.processPlaceholder: Explain how you scope the job, confirm details, prepare materials, schedule work, and follow up.
faq.advice: What advice would you give a customer looking to hire a provider in your area of work?
faq.advicePlaceholder: Share what customers should check, prepare, compare, or ask before choosing someone.

verification.title: Verify your identity
verification.subtitle: Every professional on Mestermind is identity-verified before going live. Checks are typically completed within a few hours.
verification.secureTitle: Your data is encrypted and secure
verification.secureText: Documents are uploaded to owner-restricted storage and reviewed before a profile can go live.
verification.idHint: Személyi igazolvány, passport, or driving licence. All four corners must be visible.
verification.selfieHint: Take a selfie or upload a photo of your face so we can confirm the ID belongs to you.
verification.selfieUploadHint: Uses camera on mobile · good lighting, neutral background

credentials.title: Trade credentials
credentials.unregulated: {category} is an unregulated trade — no licence or certificate is required. You're good to move on.
credentials.regulated: {category} is a regulated trade in Hungary. Upload your certificate so customers know you're qualified.
credentials.insuranceHint: Required for structural and gas work.

background.title: Background check
background.subtitle: This step is optional at launch. Pros who opt in get a visible {badge} badge on their profile — a meaningful trust signal that meaningfully increases enquiry rates.
background.yes: Yes, run a background check on me
background.yesBody: You'll receive the {badge} badge once the check completes (typically 1–3 business days). Customers filter by this badge.
background.skipBody: You can opt in from your dashboard at any time.
background.checkBody: Criminal record search via a registered Hungarian provider. You'll be asked to consent and provide your ID number. Results are shared only with you — not publicly displayed.

payout.title: Pricing & payouts
payout.subtitle: Mestermind Pro is a flat-rate subscription. You keep what customers pay you directly, and the subscription unlocks lead and profile features.
payout.ibanHint: Starts with HU followed by 26 digits. Payouts are sent 3 business days after job completion.
payout.setupAfterApprovalBody: We will collect bank details through the verified payout provider before your first paid job. Do not enter bank details during this preview flow.
payout.flatRateBody: Unlimited job inquiries, priority search placement, a verified badge, visible profile reviews, category featuring, and direct customer messages.
payout.subscribeBody: Once your profile is submitted, open Pro settings to subscribe securely through Stripe and activate the paid features.

complete.verifyError: Please return to the account step and verify your phone number before submitting your profile.
complete.shareNotReady: Your profile link is not ready yet.
complete.shareFailed: Could not share automatically. Copy the profile link from your browser after opening it.
complete.title: You're in, {name}.
complete.body: Your profile has been submitted and your first month of Mestermind Pro is active. Once identity verification completes, you'll go live with priority placement, visible reviews, and direct inquiries.
complete.howToTitle: How to land your first job
complete.howToBody: That first review is the hardest. Here's what moves the needle.
complete.checklist1: Respond to enquiries within 1 hour — fast response rate is your single biggest early advantage.
complete.checklist2: Add past projects if you have not already — profiles with real examples get more views.
complete.checklist3: Set a competitive starting price. You can always negotiate up on larger jobs.
complete.checklist4: Share your profile link on WhatsApp and social — your existing network is your first source of reviews.
complete.backgroundBody: Your {badge} badge will appear on your profile once the check completes — usually 1–3 business days.

header.title: Jobs
header.pendingSingular: {count} new request waiting for your response
header.pendingPlural: {count} new requests waiting for your response

hidden.copy: New inquiries are waiting with details hidden. Upgrade to unlock every request now, or your free views refresh on {resetLabel}.
hidden.freeViewsSingular: You've used {count} free clear view this month.
hidden.freeViewsPlural: You've used {count} free clear views this month.
hidden.title: More inquiries are waiting
hidden.detailsHidden: Details are hidden after your monthly free clear views are used.
hidden.upgradeBody: Upgrade to Mestermind Pro to unlock every new request immediately, or wait until {resetLabel} when your free views refresh.

empty.pendingHint: New requests from customers will appear here.
empty.defaultHint: Nothing to show in this tab yet.

sidebar.nextActionBody: Check the scope, service area, availability, and whether materials or travel should be included before quoting.

quoteChecklist.coverage: Can I cover the district and arrival window?
quoteChecklist.priceClear: Is my price clear about labour, materials, travel, and disposal?
quoteChecklist.needDetails: Do I need photos, measurements, or a call before giving a firm quote?
quoteChecklist.customerPrep: What should the customer prepare before I arrive?

sidebar.noMix: Your request mix will appear here once customers contact you.

quoteModal.title: Your quote for {category}
quoteModal.priceHint: Enter a starting price. You can adjust the final amount after discussing the full scope.
quoteModal.notesPlaceholder: Describe your experience, what's included in the price, and any questions you have about the job.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

bullets.customerNotified: The customer will be notified and will look for another professional.
bullets.visibility: Declining frequently lowers your visibility in search results.
bullets.permanentlyClosed: This request will be permanently closed - you won't be able to re-open it.

header.title: Projects looking for quotes
header.subtitle: Browse active customer projects that match your trade and service area. Marketplace quotes stay separate for customers until they choose to hire you.

unavailable.title: Marketplace unavailable
unavailable.body: Your account is not eligible for marketplace quoting yet.

empty.title: No matching marketplace projects
empty.body: New active projects in your trade and districts will appear here.

items.separateSection: Customers see these in a separate marketplace section on their project.
items.noJobUntilAccepted: Your quote does not create a job or conversation unless the customer accepts it.
items.normalWorkflow: Accepted marketplace quotes move into your normal jobs workflow.

header.title: My Work
header.subtitle: Confirmed appointments and accepted jobs ready to schedule.

appointments.title: Upcoming work
appointments.empty: Confirmed customer appointments will appear here.

header.title: Earnings
header.subtitle: Track real revenue from completed jobs, expected revenue from accepted work, and quote pipeline value.

activeJobs.body: Mark finished work complete, then customers can confirm it and move the value into real earnings.

jobList.recentEmpty: Completed jobs will appear here after customers confirm the work.
jobList.expectedEmpty: Accepted jobs will appear here before they are completed.

topMatch.title: Start with your best matches
topMatch.body: Open a profile to send a detailed request and receive a quote.

empty.title: No professionals match these filters
empty.body: Try clearing filters or broadening your search.

notFound.title: Profile not found
notFound.body: This professional's profile doesn't exist or has been removed.

faqLabels.pricing: What should customers know about your pricing?

why.title: Why this pro?
why.experienceSingular: has been in business for {years} year
why.experiencePlural: has been in business for {years} years
why.trustCopy: Verified profile details help customers book with confidence.
why.summary: {name} {experience}{serviceCopy}. Customers can review pricing, photos, credentials, and FAQs before requesting an estimate.{trustCopy}
why.disclaimer: Summarized from the pro's profile. Review their profile for the latest.

about.empty: {name} has not added a full bio yet. You can still request an estimate and ask about experience, timing, and approach.

projects.empty: No past projects yet. Ask {name} to share examples relevant to your project.

reviews.writtenComing: Written reviews will appear here as customers review completed jobs.
reviews.noneYet: No reviews yet. Reviews appear after customers confirm completed jobs.
reviews.trustCopy: Your trust means everything to us.
reviews.proOnly: Reviews are visible after this pro activates Mestermind Pro.

faqFallback.included: What is included in the estimate?
faqFallback.materials: Are materials or travel charged separately?
faqFallback.preparation: What preparation is needed before arrival?
faqFallback.pastWork: Can they share similar past work?

signup.title: Request your estimate
signup.subtitle: Sign up first, then we'll send this estimate request automatically.
signup.termsPrefix: By clicking Create account, you agree to the

request.title: Request an estimate
request.subtitle: Answer a few job details so {name} can send an accurate quote.
request.guaranteeBody: If you hire this pro, you're covered by our satisfaction guarantee.
request.modalSubtitle: Share the basics now. You can coordinate photos, timing, and final details after the pro replies.
request.describePlaceholder: Tell the pro what needs doing, what problem you are seeing, measurements, photos you can share later, and anything unusual about the job.
request.attachmentsHint: Upload up to {count} files. Photos help pros quote repair, painting, moving, cleaning, and carpentry jobs faster.
request.sentBody: {name} will get back to you shortly.

errors.describeWork: Please describe the work you need help with.
errors.chooseUrgency: Please choose how urgent the job is.
errors.fileType: Upload photos or PDF files only.
errors.fileSize: Each attachment must be under 10 MB.
errors.locationSkipped: Location permission was skipped. We will use your selected district instead.
errors.locationFailed: We could not capture browser location. We will use your selected district instead.
errors.signInExisting: Sign in to send an existing project.

errors.stripeUrl: Stripe did not return a billing URL.
errors.load: Could not load your pro profile.

billing.title: Mestermind Pro
billing.activeBody: Your Pro benefits are active across search, reviews, and customer inquiries.
billing.inactiveBody: Turn your profile into a higher-converting listing with priority visibility and trust signals.
billing.manageCopy: Manage your billing any time in Stripe.
billing.subscribeCopy: Start with your included trial, then keep Pro active through Stripe.

visibility.title: Profile visibility
visibility.visibleBody: Your approved profile can appear in customer search and receive estimate requests.
visibility.pausedBody: Your profile is paused and hidden from search. Existing conversations are unchanged.

header.subtitle: Track quotes and projects with the pros you've contacted.

actions.reviewQuote: Review the quote and accept or decline it.
actions.confirmAppointment: Confirm the appointment time proposed by the pro.
actions.confirmCompletion: Confirm the job is complete if the work is finished.
actions.waitingForQuote: Waiting for {name} to send a quote.
actions.appointmentConfirmed: Appointment confirmed. Message the pro if anything changes.
actions.coordinateDetails: Coordinate details with the pro and wait for an appointment proposal.

delete.hasAppointment: Requests with appointments cannot be deleted.
delete.confirmActive: Delete this request? It will be cancelled for the pro and hidden from your account.
delete.confirm: Delete this request from your account?

empty.title: No requests yet
empty.body: Find a pro and submit a project to get started.

emptyStatus.body: Choose another status to see different requests.
emptyStatus.projectBody: This project has no requests in that status.

completion.title: Confirm job completion
completion.body: {name} marked this job complete. Confirm once the work is finished to close the request.

location.title: Service location
location.acceptedNote: Your full address is shared with the pro in your acceptance details.
location.pendingNote: The pro sees this approximate area. Exact address is shared after you accept a quote.

detail.pendingResponse: {name} typically responds within a few hours.

cancelModal.title: Cancel with {name}?
cancelModal.body: This cancels the request and notifies {name}.
cancelModal.detailsPlaceholder: Add anything the pro should know, such as timing, scope changes, or whether you may rebook later.
cancelModal.followUp: I need Mestermind support to follow up about this cancellation.

reasons.couldNotCoordinate: I could not coordinate with the pro

help.title: We can help with this request
help.body: Questions about quotes, scheduling, cancellations, or next steps? Include this request ID when contacting support.

review.title: How did {name} do?
review.body: Your public review helps other customers choose with confidence.
review.commentPlaceholder: Mention communication, quality, timing, value, and whether you would hire them again.

acceptModal.title: Hire {name}
acceptModal.body: Your message and contact details are shared with {name} so you can coordinate the job.
acceptModal.messagePlaceholder: Hi! I'd like to move forward. I'm available...
acceptModal.phoneTitle: Use country code and digits only, for example +36301234567.
acceptModal.startLabel: When would you like to start?

errors.message: Please write a message so the pro knows how to reach you.
errors.phone: Please add a phone number so the pro can reach you.
errors.phoneFormat: Enter your phone number with country code and digits only, e.g. +36301234567.
errors.address: Please add the service address for the appointment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

declineModal.title: Decline {name}'s quote?
declineModal.body: The pro will be notified. You can request quotes from other pros anytime.
declineModal.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Price is above my budget

pending.title: Request sent
pending.body: Your request is with the pro. They can review the details and send a quote when ready.

quoted.title: Quote received
quoted.body: Review the price, timeline, and notes. You can accept the quote or decline it.

accepted.title: Job confirmed
accepted.body: You hired the pro. Use messages to coordinate details and confirm any appointment requests.

completed.title: Completed
completed.body: The job is marked complete. Your request history and conversation remain available.

declined.title: Declined
declined.body: This request is no longer active. You can start a new request from the pro profile.

cancelled.title: Cancelled
cancelled.body: This request was cancelled. Your request history and messages remain available.

hero.body: Join 1,200+ professionals already using Mestermind to find clients, build their reputation, and grow their income across Budapest.

benefits.headline: Everything you need to win more jobs.
benefits.body: Built for independent professionals who want to spend more time working and less time finding work.

found.title: Get found by thousands
found.body: Mestermind connects you with customers actively searching for your services across all 23 Budapest districts.

schedule.title: You control your schedule
schedule.body: Accept only the jobs you want, when you want them. No pressure, no commitments you didn't agree to.

paid.title: Get paid fairly
paid.body: Set your own rates. Customers see your starting price upfront, so the people who contact you are already interested.

reputation.title: Build your reputation
reputation.body: Every completed job is an opportunity for a verified review. Great work compounds — your profile gets stronger over time.

steps.headline: Up and running in three steps.
steps.body: No complicated setup. No waiting for approval. Start receiving enquiries the same day.

profile.title: Create your profile
profile.body: Tell us about your services, experience, and pricing. Takes less than 10 minutes.

matched.title: Get matched with jobs
matched.body: We surface your profile to customers looking for exactly what you offer, in your district.

paid.title: Win the job. Get paid.
paid.body: Quote, confirm, and complete. Reviews build automatically after each job.

free.question: Is it free to join?
free.answer: Yes. Creating a profile and browsing job requests is completely free. We only charge a small fee when you win a job through the platform.

types.question: What types of professionals can join?
types.answer: Anyone offering a home or personal service — cleaners, handymen, electricians, plumbers, photographers, tutors, personal trainers, and more.

reviews.question: How do I get reviews?
reviews.answer: After every completed job, the customer receives an automatic prompt to leave a review. You don't need to ask — we handle it.

prices.question: Can I set my own prices?
prices.answer: Absolutely. You set a starting price that customers see on your profile, and you quote each job individually based on the details.

finalCta.headline: Ready to get started?
finalCta.body: Create your free profile today and start receiving job requests from customers across Budapest.

hero.searchPlaceholder: Describe your project or problem — be as detailed as you'd like!
hero.trustSuffix: with over 300k reviews on the App Store

why.body: Finding a reliable cleaner, handyman, or contractor in Budapest used to mean hours of calls and crossed fingers. Mestermind puts 1,200+ vetted professionals one search away.

fast.headline: From search to booked in minutes.
fast.body: No more scrolling through Facebook groups, chasing unresponsive numbers, or hoping for the best. Describe your project, pick your district, and get matched with available professionals immediately.

verified.headline: Every pro reviewed by real Budapest residents.
verified.body: Ratings come from verified customers — not bots, not the pros themselves. Read what your neighbours actually experienced before you commit to anyone.

prices.headline: See prices before you pick up the phone.
prices.body: Transparent starting prices on every listing. Request quotes from multiple pros, compare what you get, and choose the best fit. No surprises, no awkward conversations.

eszter.quote: Found an excellent house cleaner within minutes. The booking process was seamless and the job was done better than any agency I've used before.

bence.quote: Plumbing emergency on a Sunday. Mestermind connected me with someone who arrived within two hours. Saved my entire weekend.

reka.quote: We hired a photography team for our company event. Professional, punctual, and the results were exactly what we needed. Will use again.

categories.headline: 550+ services, one platform.
categories.body: From a leaking tap to a corporate event — we have a professional for it.

steps.headline: Up and running in three steps.
steps.body: No account required to browse. No commitment until you book.

describe.title: Describe your project
describe.body: Tell us what you need — be as specific as you like. The more detail you give, the better your matches.

match.title: Get matched instantly
match.body: We surface vetted, reviewed professionals available in your Budapest district right now.

book.title: Book with confidence
book.body: Compare prices and reviews side by side, then hire directly through the platform.

finalCta.headline: Budapest's home services, sorted.
finalCta.body: Join thousands of residents who find trusted professionals on Mestermind every day.

header.title: My projects
header.subtitle: Reusable job briefs you can send to more pros without filling out the form again.

empty.title: No active projects
empty.body: Projects appear here after you request an estimate from a pro.

delete.confirm: Delete this project? Related requests will be hidden from your account, and any active requests will be cancelled. Projects with completed jobs or appointments cannot be deleted.

create.title: Describe your project
create.subtitle: Use the same estimate request fields now, then send this project to one or more pros later.
create.describePlaceholder: Tell pros what needs doing, what problem you are seeing, measurements, photos you can share, and anything unusual about the job.

errors.fileType: Upload photos or PDF files only.
errors.fileSize: Each attachment must be under 10 MB.
errors.required: Category, district, urgency, and project details are required.

marketplace.title: Marketplace quotes
marketplace.body: These pros found your open project. They stay separate from the pros you chose directly.

placeholders.task: e.g. fix a leaking tap, hang shelves...

header.title: My appointments
header.subtitle: Confirmed appointments with pros you've hired.

empty.title: No confirmed appointments
empty.body: Appointments appear here after you confirm a pro's proposed time.

emptyStatus.title: No {status} appointments
emptyStatus.body: Choose another service status to see different appointments.

customer.subtitle: Conversations with pros about your projects.
customer.emptyBody: Accept a quote on a request to start messaging a pro.

pro.subtitle: Conversations with customers who hired you.
pro.emptyBody: When a customer accepts your quote, the conversation will appear here.

list.title: Messages
list.noResultsBody: Try a customer, pro, service, or message keyword.
list.customerTipQuote: Confirm what is included in the quote before work starts.
list.customerTipAccess: Share timing, access, parking, pets, and anything fragile nearby.
list.customerTipScope: Keep scope changes in the conversation so both sides have the same record.
list.proTipStart: Confirm the start window, exact access details, and any prep needed.
list.proTipCosts: Call out materials, parking, or extra costs before arriving.
list.proTipBrief: Use the job page if you need the full project brief while replying.

appointmentModal.title: Schedule with {name}
appointmentModal.subtitle: Propose a time for a quote visit or the service appointment.
appointmentModal.quoteVisitBody: Inspect the scope before a firm price.
appointmentModal.locationPlaceholder: Customer address, district, or video call
appointmentModal.messagePlaceholder: Mention what you will inspect, what the customer should prepare, and whether this is for the quote or service.

errors.send: Could not send the appointment request. Please try again.

checklist.customerConfirm: Ask {name} to confirm timing, materials, and what is included.
checklist.customerAccess: Share access notes like parking, pets, gate codes, or elevator limits.
checklist.customerScope: Keep scope changes here so the quote and job details stay clear.
checklist.proAddress: Confirm the customer address, start window, and any prep needed.
checklist.proCosts: Mention extra costs before the visit, especially materials or parking.
checklist.proNextSteps: Summarize next steps so the customer knows what happens after this chat.

thread.emptyThread: Send a message to start the conversation.
thread.proposeTime: Propose a time for a quote visit or the service appointment.
